key_features: Integrated 36V / 15Ah Samsung battery — 80km range per charge
Cargo capacity: 40kg rear rack + 15kg front basket
Integrated front/rear lights with USB-C charging port
Smart display with GPS, cadence, and battery management
Foldable design — fits standard elevator and most car trunks
brief.target_audience: Urban commuters 25–45, small business owners doing local deliveries, eco-conscious buyers replacing car trips
brief.usp: The only EU-legal cargo e-bike that folds — park it inside, not on the street
brief.extra_context: EN 15194 compliant. 2-year comprehensive warranty. VDE certified battery. EU delivery 3–5 days. Available in 4 colors: matte black, forest green, slate grey, sunrise orange.

brand_voice.tone: Energetic and practical — we believe cities are better without cars and we're not shy about it
brand_voice.style: Punchy. Direct. Benefits-first. Urban vernacular without being overly casual.
brand_voice.sample_copy: Your city doesn't need another car. The VeloCargo City folds in 15 seconds, carries 55kg of cargo, and covers 80km on a single charge. It fits in your elevator. It parks in your hallway. And it costs less to run for a year than one month of city parking.
